caption:
How much I spent on travel in 2025 & how I’m managing it now! this number seems crazy, but remember — travel is also my business, so these are like my monthly operating expenses. I definitely want to scale this down in 2026 though and @revolut is going to help me keep track of it all! #ad #RevolutPartner

Join Revolut and get $20 through the 🔗 in my bio! Offer expires 6 months from 12/30/2025. Exclusions apply. $20 bonus paid by Revolut subject to the terms and conditions found: revolut.com/en-US/legal/partner-sign-up-bonus/

transcription.text: Hi, I'm Remy and I spent way too much money on travel this year. So I'm going to tell you how much and how I managed it all. And the number is crazy, but my step one, which is tracking everything monthly makes it okay. In the end, if you're not tracking your finances monthly, at least you need to be doing it. I use Revolut. It's perfect if you're a remote worker or you're traveling a lot because I can spend abroad in over 25 currencies. I can send and receive money internationally at low fees. I can withdraw cash at in network ATMs with no fees. And I can even exchange money in the app without getting screwed by bad rates. I've also been using it for my HYSA, which if you don't have one, you need one because Revolut's APY is actually insane. It's up to 5.5% on the metal plan or 4% on the standard plan. And I can access my money anytime with no lock-in. So here's how much I spent per month on travel this year. And yes, it seems crazy, but I do manage my money in a way that lets me travel more because it's my priority and it's also part of my business. If you also want to try Revolut, you can get $20 when you sign up with my code. It's one of the best ways you could be managing your money.
